matchedText: The official programme page for MSSc in Global Political Economy lists Main application period opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-01-31. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 31 January 2026
matchedTextAfter: *Excluding the Postgraduate Certificate in Laws programme offered by the Faculty of Law
